name: city-xcape-niche
description: The City Xcape Niche - A luxury hotel management platform with multi-role access (Super Admin, Moderators, Guests). Backed by Supabase, packaged with Capacitor for Play Store.

scripts.android:open: npm run cap:sync && cap open android
scripts.android:run: npm run cap:sync && cap run android
scripts.android:build: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
